requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 (US National Deviation of IEC 60601-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1（IEC 60601-1美国国家偏差版本）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1（IEC 60601-1美國國家偏差版本）

summary.en: ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 is the US national adoption of IEC 60601-1 (3rd edition) with US-specific deviations (amendment differences noted in Annex B of the AAMI publication). It covers general requirements for basic safety and essential performance of medical electrical equipment. For FDA market entry, manufacturers must demonstrate conformity to FDA-recognized consensus standards; ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 is listed in FDA's Recognized Consensus Standards database. Conformity is declared via an Accession Declaration of Conformity (DoC) submitted with the 510(k) or PMA, or cited in a De Novo request. Third-party testing by an OSHA-accredited NRTL (e.g., UL, TUV SUD, Intertek) is industry norm and effectively required for FDA acceptance. Key US deviations include different grounding/earthing requirements and specific clauses on mains voltage tolerances.
summary.zh: ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1是IEC 60601-1第三版的美国国家采用版，包含美国特定偏差（偏差差异列于AAMI出版物附件B）。涵盖医疗电气设备基本安全和基本性能的通用要求。进入FDA市场，制造商须证明符合FDA认可共识标准；ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1已列入FDA认可共识标准数据库。符合性通过随510(k)或PMA提交的合格声明（DoC）声明，或在De Novo申请中引用。由OSHA认可的NRTL（如UL、TUV SUD、Intertek）进行第三方检测是行业惯例，实际上是FDA接受的必要条件。主要美国偏差包括不同的接地要求及主电源电压容差的特定条款。
summary.zht: ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1是IEC 60601-1第三版的美國國家採用版，包含美國特定偏差（偏差差異列於AAMI出版物附件B）。涵蓋醫療電氣設備基本安全和基本性能的通用要求。進入FDA市場，製造商須證明符合FDA認可共識標準；ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1已列入FDA認可共識標準數據庫。符合性通過隨510(k)或PMA提交的合格聲明（DoC）聲明，或在De Novo申請中引用。由OSHA認可的NRTL（如UL、TUV SUD、Intertek）進行第三方檢測是行業慣例，實際上是FDA接受的必要條件。主要美國偏差包括不同的接地要求及主電源電壓容差的特定條款。

standards_or_laws: ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1:2005/(R)2012 and A1:2012/(R)2017 and A2:2010/(R)2017 — Medical electrical equipment — Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance (US national deviation of IEC 60601-1 Ed.3)
FDA Recognized Consensus Standards Database (ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 listed)
FDA Guidance: Use of Consensus Standards in Premarket Submissions

summary.en: GB 9706.1-2020 is China's national standard for general requirements for basic safety and essential performance of medical electrical equipment, aligned to IEC 60601-1 Ed.3 (with minor Chinese deviations). It became mandatory for new product registrations as of 1 April 2023 (superseding GB 9706.1-1995 which was based on IEC 60601-1 Ed.2). NMPA (National Medical Products Administration) registration requires testing against GB 9706.1-2020 by a CNAS-accredited or NMPA-designated laboratory. Test reports and technical dossiers are submitted as part of the medical device registration dossier (Class II/III). The Chinese edition follows IEC 60601-1 Ed.3 structure closely, making cross-recognition partially feasible, but a separate Chinese test report to GB 9706.1-2020 is still required.
summary.zh: GB 9706.1-2020是中国关于医疗电气设备基本安全和基本性能通用要求的国家标准，与IEC 60601-1第三版对齐（含少量中国偏差）。自2023年4月1日起对新产品注册强制执行（替代基于IEC 60601-1第二版的GB 9706.1-1995）。国家药品监督管理局（NMPA）注册要求由CNAS认可或NMPA指定实验室依据GB 9706.1-2020进行检测。检测报告和技术文档作为医疗器械注册申报资料（二类/三类）的一部分提交。中国版本结构与IEC 60601-1第三版高度一致，使部分交叉认可成为可能，但仍需提供单独的GB 9706.1-2020中国检测报告。
summary.zht: GB 9706.1-2020是中國關於醫療電氣設備基本安全和基本性能通用要求的國家標準，與IEC 60601-1第三版對齊（含少量中國偏差）。自2023年4月1日起對新產品註冊強制執行（替代基於IEC 60601-1第二版的GB 9706.1-1995）。國家藥品監督管理局（NMPA）註冊要求由CNAS認可或NMPA指定實驗室依據GB 9706.1-2020進行檢測。檢測報告和技術文檔作為醫療器械註冊申報資料（二類/三類）的一部分提交。中國版本結構與IEC 60601-1第三版高度一致，使部分交叉認可成為可能，但仍需提供單獨的GB 9706.1-2020中國檢測報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 9706.1-2020 — Medical electrical equipment — Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance (aligned to IEC 60601-1 Ed.3, mandatory from 2023-04-01)
NMPA Medical Device Registration Regulations (Order No. 47, 2021)

gap.en: Both US (ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1) and CN (GB 9706.1-2020) are rooted in IEC 60601-1 Ed.3, so the core technical requirements substantially overlap. Key gaps: (1) US requires testing by an OSHA-recognised NRTL and a Declaration of Conformity filed with FDA; CN requires testing by a CNAS/NMPA-designated lab — reports are not mutually recognised. (2) ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 carries US national deviations (Annex B) not present in GB 9706.1-2020, particularly on grounding and mains voltage tolerances; a gap analysis against the specific US deviations is needed. (3) FDA submission (510(k)/PMA/De Novo) must cite the US edition specifically; GB reports citing the Chinese edition alone are insufficient. (4) Practical timeline: commissioning a separate US NRTL test report typically adds 8–16 weeks and USD 15,000–40,000 to a China-cleared device. [UNVERIFIED: exact cost/timeline ranges]
gap.zh: 美国（ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1）和中国（GB 9706.1-2020）均以IEC 60601-1第三版为基础，核心技术要求高度重叠。主要差距：（1）美国要求由OSHA认可的NRTL进行检测，并向FDA提交合格声明；中国要求由CNAS/NMPA指定实验室进行检测——报告互不认可。（2）ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1包含GB 9706.1-2020中没有的美国国家偏差（附件B），特别是接地和主电源电压容差方面；需针对具体美国偏差进行差距分析。（3）FDA申报（510(k)/PMA/De Novo）必须明确引用美国版本；仅引用中国版本的GB报告不足以满足要求。（4）实际时间线：为中国已获证产品单独委托美国NRTL检测报告通常需额外增加8–16周和1.5–4万美元费用。[未经核实：费用/时间范围]
gap.zht: 美國（ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1）和中國（GB 9706.1-2020）均以IEC 60601-1第三版為基礎，核心技術要求高度重疊。主要差距：（1）美國要求由OSHA認可的NRTL進行檢測，並向FDA提交合格聲明；中國要求由CNAS/NMPA指定實驗室進行檢測——報告互不認可。（2）ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1包含GB 9706.1-2020中沒有的美國國家偏差（附件B），特別是接地和主電源電壓容差方面；需針對具體美國偏差進行差距分析。（3）FDA申報（510(k)/PMA/De Novo）必須明確引用美國版本；僅引用中國版本的GB報告不足以滿足要求。（4）實際時間線：為中國已獲證產品單獨委託美國NRTL檢測報告通常需額外增加8–16週和1.5–4萬美元費用。[未經核實：費用/時間範圍]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required for FDA premarket submission (510(k)/PMA/De Novo) via Declaration of Conformity to FDA-recognised consensus standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9706.1-2020 required for NMPA registration of medical electrical equipment (Class II/III) from 2023-04-01

source.publisher: U.S. FDA Center for Devices and Radiological Health (CDRH) — Recognized Consensus Standards Database; AAMI (Association for the Advancement of Medical Instrumentation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL ONLY] A device tested to GB 9706.1-2020 has a strong technical foundation for US compliance given shared IEC 60601-1 Ed.3 lineage, but a separate ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 test report from a US NRTL is required for FDA submission. The US national deviations (Annex B) must be specifically addressed. This assessment is informational and does not constitute regulatory or legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据GB 9706.1-2020完成检测的设备，因共享IEC 60601-1第三版基础，具备良好的美国合规技术基础，但FDA申报仍需提供来自美国NRTL的ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1单独检测报告。必须专门处理美国国家偏差（附件B）。本评估仅供参考，不构成监管或法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據GB 9706.1-2020完成檢測的設備，因共享IEC 60601-1第三版基礎，具備良好的美國合規技術基礎，但FDA申報仍需提供來自美國NRTL的ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1單獨檢測報告。必須專門處理美國國家偏差（附件B）。本評估僅供參考，不構成監管或法律建議。

summary.en: IEC 60601-1-2 (4th edition, 2014; collateral standard to IEC 60601-1) specifies EMC requirements — both electromagnetic emissions (radiated and conducted) and immunity — for medical electrical equipment and systems. In the US, FDA recognises IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 in its Recognized Consensus Standards database. Manufacturers declare conformity via a DoC submitted with the premarket submission. The standard imposes a risk-based approach: manufacturers must document an electromagnetic disturbance risk management file. Equipment must meet emission limits aligned to CISPR 11 (industrial/scientific/medical) and immunity tests covering ESD, radiated immunity, EFT/burst, surge, conducted immunity, magnetic fields, and voltage dips/interruptions. The 4th edition introduced more stringent requirements for intended-use environments (home healthcare, professional healthcare, special environments).
summary.zh: IEC 60601-1-2（2014年第四版；IEC 60601-1的附属标准）规定了医疗电气设备及系统的电磁兼容性要求——包括电磁发射（辐射和传导）和抗扰度。在美国，FDA在其认可共识标准数据库中认可IEC 60601-1-2第四版。制造商通过随上市前申报提交的合格声明（DoC）声明符合性。该标准采用基于风险的方法：制造商必须记录电磁干扰风险管理文件。设备须符合与CISPR 11（工业/科学/医疗）对齐的发射限值，及涵盖静电放电、辐射抗扰度、电快速瞬变/脉冲群、浪涌、传导抗扰度、磁场、电压暂降/中断的抗扰度测试。第四版针对预期使用环境（家庭医疗、专业医疗、特殊环境）引入了更严格的要求。
summary.zht: IEC 60601-1-2（2014年第四版；IEC 60601-1的附屬標準）規定了醫療電氣設備及系統的電磁相容性要求——包括電磁發射（輻射和傳導）和抗擾度。在美國，FDA在其認可共識標準數據庫中認可IEC 60601-1-2第四版。製造商通過隨上市前申報提交的合格聲明（DoC）聲明符合性。該標準採用基於風險的方法：製造商必須記錄電磁干擾風險管理文件。設備須符合與CISPR 11（工業/科學/醫療）對齊的發射限值，及涵蓋靜電放電、輻射抗擾度、電快速瞬變/脈衝群、浪涌、傳導抗擾度、磁場、電壓暫降/中斷的抗擾度測試。第四版針對預期使用環境（家庭醫療、專業醫療、特殊環境）引入了更嚴格的要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60601-1-2:2014 Ed.4 — Medical electrical equipment — Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance — Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements and tests
FDA Recognized Consensus Standards Database (IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 listed)
47 CFR Part 15 (FCC — additional US radio frequency emission requirements may apply depending on device functionality)

summary.en: GB/T 18268.1-2010 and GB/T 18268.26-2010 are China's national standards for EMC of measuring and control equipment (general and particular requirements), but these are not medical-specific. For medical electrical equipment EMC, China has adopted YY 0505-2012, which is based on IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.3 (2007). A new edition aligned to IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 (2014) — YY 9706.102 — has been published and became mandatory for new NMPA registrations from 1 April 2023, alongside GB 9706.1-2020. NMPA registration requires EMC testing by a CNAS-accredited or NMPA-designated laboratory to YY 9706.102. [UNVERIFIED: exact mandatory date and transition status of YY 9706.102 vs YY 0505-2012]
summary.zh: GB/T 18268.1-2010和GB/T 18268.26-2010是中国测量和控制设备电磁兼容性的国家标准（通用和特定要求），但非医疗专用。对于医疗电气设备的EMC，中国采用了YY 0505-2012，该标准基于IEC 60601-1-2第三版（2007年）。与IEC 60601-1-2第四版（2014年）对齐的新版本——YY 9706.102——已发布，并自2023年4月1日起与GB 9706.1-2020一同对新NMPA注册强制执行。NMPA注册要求由CNAS认可或NMPA指定实验室依据YY 9706.102进行EMC检测。[未经核实：YY 9706.102与YY 0505-2012的确切强制日期和过渡状态]
summary.zht: GB/T 18268.1-2010和GB/T 18268.26-2010是中國測量和控制設備電磁相容性的國家標準（通用和特定要求），但非醫療專用。對於醫療電氣設備的EMC，中國採用了YY 0505-2012，該標準基於IEC 60601-1-2第三版（2007年）。與IEC 60601-1-2第四版（2014年）對齊的新版本——YY 9706.102——已發布，並自2023年4月1日起與GB 9706.1-2020一同對新NMPA註冊強制執行。NMPA註冊要求由CNAS認可或NMPA指定實驗室依據YY 9706.102進行EMC檢測。[未經核實：YY 9706.102與YY 0505-2012的確切強制日期和過渡狀態]

standards_or_laws: YY 9706.102-2021 — Medical electrical equipment — Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance — Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances (aligned to IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4, mandatory from 2023-04-01) [UNVERIFIED: exact mandatory date]
YY 0505-2012 — Medical electrical equipment EMC (based on IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.3, legacy)

gap.en: Both US (IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 via FDA recognition) and CN (YY 9706.102, aligned to Ed.4) now reference the same IEC edition, so the technical test content is substantially aligned. Key gaps: (1) Test reports are not mutually recognised — US requires testing by an OSHA-accredited NRTL or equivalent accredited lab for FDA submission; CN requires a CNAS/NMPA-designated lab. (2) FCC Part 15 emission requirements apply separately in the US for any device that incidentally emits radio frequency energy — this has no direct CN equivalent and may require additional FCC testing not covered by IEC 60601-1-2 alone. (3) The risk management documentation (electromagnetic disturbance risk management file) required by IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 must be maintained in the technical file for FDA; CN registration dossier requirements for this file should be independently verified. (4) If a device was tested to YY 0505-2012 (Ed.3-based) for prior CN registration, it must be re-tested to YY 9706.102 / IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 for new submissions in both markets. [UNVERIFIED: FCC Part 15 applicability scope for passive/non-RF medical devices]
gap.zh: 美国（通过FDA认可的IEC 60601-1-2第四版）和中国（与第四版对齐的YY 9706.102）现均引用相同IEC版本，技术检测内容高度一致。主要差距：（1）检测报告互不认可——美国FDA申报要求由OSHA认可的NRTL或同等认可实验室进行检测；中国要求CNAS/NMPA指定实验室。（2）FCC第15部分发射要求在美国单独适用于任何附带发射射频能量的设备——这在中国没有直接对应要求，可能需要IEC 60601-1-2单独无法涵盖的额外FCC测试。（3）IEC 60601-1-2第四版要求的风险管理文件（电磁干扰风险管理文件）必须在FDA技术文件中维护；中国注册申报资料对该文件的具体要求应独立核实。（4）若设备曾依据YY 0505-2012（基于第三版）进行检测用于早期中国注册，则在两个市场的新申报中均须依据YY 9706.102/IEC 60601-1-2第四版重新检测。[未经核实：FCC第15部分对被动/非射频医疗器械的适用范围]
gap.zht: 美國（通過FDA認可的IEC 60601-1-2第四版）和中國（與第四版對齊的YY 9706.102）現均引用相同IEC版本，技術檢測內容高度一致。主要差距：（1）檢測報告互不認可——美國FDA申報要求由OSHA認可的NRTL或同等認可實驗室進行檢測；中國要求CNAS/NMPA指定實驗室。（2）FCC第15部分發射要求在美國單獨適用於任何附帶發射射頻能量的設備——這在中國沒有直接對應要求，可能需要IEC 60601-1-2單獨無法涵蓋的額外FCC測試。（3）IEC 60601-1-2第四版要求的風險管理文件（電磁干擾風險管理文件）必須在FDA技術文件中維護；中國註冊申報資料對該文件的具體要求應獨立核實。（4）若設備曾依據YY 0505-2012（基於第三版）進行檢測用於早期中國註冊，則在兩個市場的新申報中均須依據YY 9706.102/IEC 60601-1-2第四版重新檢測。[未經核實：FCC第15部分對被動/非射頻醫療器械的適用範圍]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 is FDA-recognised; Declaration of Conformity required in premarket submission. FCC Part 15 separately mandatory for applicable devices.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — YY 9706.102-2021 (aligned to IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4) required for NMPA registration of medical electrical equipment from 2023-04-01 [UNVERIFIED: transition date]

source.publisher: U.S. FDA Center for Devices and Radiological Health (CDRH) — Recognized Consensus Standards Database; IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL ONLY] A device tested to YY 9706.102 (IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4-aligned) for CN registration has a strong technical basis for US compliance, but a separate test report from a US-recognised laboratory is required for FDA submission. Additional FCC Part 15 compliance may be required. This assessment is informational and does not constitute regulatory or legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据YY 9706.102（与IEC 60601-1-2第四版对齐）完成中国注册检测的设备，具备良好的美国合规技术基础，但FDA申报仍需提供来自美国认可实验室的单独检测报告。可能还需满足FCC第15部分的额外合规要求。本评估仅供参考，不构成监管或法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據YY 9706.102（與IEC 60601-1-2第四版對齊）完成中國註冊檢測的設備，具備良好的美國合規技術基礎，但FDA申報仍需提供來自美國認可實驗室的單獨檢測報告。可能還需滿足FCC第15部分的額外合規要求。本評估僅供參考，不構成監管或法律建議。
